name: @ngotrnghia1811/plugin-pplx-research
description: opencode plugin: Perplexity Deep Research via Camoufox browser automation

_comments.standaloneNpm: This package is intended as a standalone npm package (OQ-3). Keep private:true during dev; set to false before publishing. Installed by end users via the plugin array in opencode.json.
_comments.postinstall: The postinstall script bootstraps Python deps (camoufox, etc.) with graceful degradation on failure (OQ-8). Design: detect Python → pip install -r requirements.txt → python -m camoufox fetch. Each step warns and continues on failure (exit 0). Only exit non-zero for truly unrecoverable states. See scripts/bootstrap-python.mjs.
_comments.bundledPythonAgent: The Python agent lives under python-agent/ alongside this package. Ships inside the npm package (OQ-7). The postinstall bootstraps its dependencies.
_comments.optionalDependencies.playwright: Only needed for Option A (TS Playwright in-process). For v1 Option B (shell to Python), this is unused but listed for future migration.
_comments.deps: zod comes transitively via @opencode-ai/plugin which re-exports tool.schema as z. If we need zod directly for config parsing, add it as an explicit dep.
